title: Block Extensions
description: A mod adding in new full blocks to build with.
body:

[![Requires Quilt Standard Libraries](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/requires/quilt-standard-libraries_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)

![No Fabric!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/fabric_vector.svg)
![No Forge!](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)

[![Check out the Block Extensions gallery.](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/intergrav/devins-badges/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/block-ex/gallery)

## About
### Note: Currently usable in creative mode only.

Block Extensions adds new blocks that reuse vanilla textures found on other blocks such as furnaces, pistons, chiseled bookshelfs and so on. There are also pride patches and easter egg blocks implemented as well.

![Block showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oVnWZU5q/images/053bd776c0b39abd78bef8c787ef323fc04ea60e.png)

Missing texture blocks are dyable by right-clicking them with a dye in hand:
![Dyable missing texture blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oVnWZU5q/images/f39a02edcd2235a92edc0bfa08c1eadd16d9538a.png)
